title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_branch
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_branch' MCP tool.

workspaceRoot.description: Repo path. Default: first MCP root / cwd.

name.description: Branch name to create/delete, or the existing branch name for rename.

from.description: Commit-ish to base a new branch on (create only). Default: HEAD.

force.description: Force-delete an unmerged branch (`git branch -D`). Delete only; never overrides protected-branch rejection.
